name: Bank First Corp
summary: Bank First Corporation is a Wisconsin-based bank holding company operating through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Bank First, N.A., a national banking association. The company provides commercial banking services including commercial and industrial loans, owner-occupied commercial real estate loans, residential real estate lending, and wealth management services. It operates primarily in Wisconsin and the Stateline region of Illinois, serving businesses, real estate developers, and individual customers.
